headline: Can AI-Driven Electricity Demand Fuel CEG's Long-Term Growth?
summary: Constellation Energy's clean power deals, nuclear fleet and new generation projects position it to gain from rising AI-driven electricity demand.

headline: Vistra to Report Second Quarter Results on Aug. 7, 2026
summary: Vistra (NYSE: VST) plans to report its second quarter 2026 financial and operating results on Friday, Aug. 7, 2026, during a live conference call and webcast beginning at 10 a.m. ET (9 a.m. CT).

headline: Record Heat Dome Drove the Grid to All-Time Peak Demand Friday: Here’s 4 Stocks To Buy As Things Heat Up
summary: A once-in-a-decade heat dome baked the eastern United States this Fourth of July weekend. PJM Interconnection, which serves 67 million people across 13 states, believes that Friday’s demand passed a previous record set all the way back in August 2006. Dan Leonard, Director of Forecasting for the USA at MetDesk, joined CNBC on July 1st ... Record Heat Dome Drove the Grid to All-Time Peak Demand Friday: Here’s 4 Stocks To Buy As Things Heat Up

headline: Vistra Corp. (VST) is Attracting Investor Attention: Here is What You Should Know
